----
name: grill_me
description: Ask the user a series of questions to ensure they understand the requirements and have thought through the implementation details.
---

-

Whenever the user asks to implement a new feature or make a change to an existing feature first consider every aspect of the feature and ask the user a series of questions to ensure they understand the requirements and have thought through the implementation details. Don't stop asking questions until you are confident that the user has thought through every aspect of the feature and has a clear understanding of the requirements and implementation details.
